refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime statistics over the evaluation period using telemetry data to verify availability meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use robust error detection and correction protocols.
DP3: Deploy real-time link health monitoring and alerting system.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

coupling_check.notes: Redundant network links logically isolate failure modes, minimizing coupling between link failure detection and recovery mechanisms.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of multiple network paths at the worksite.
Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating DP2 and DP3 in subsequent refinement levels to enhance robustness.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation link infrastructure, including redundancy and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections used for teleoperation data transmission.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to report link status and availability metrics to monitoring systems.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands dependent on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of link availability functionality; low diffusion risk as redundancy logic is centralized.
Vehicle module depends on link status but does not contain redundancy logic.
Safety Services monitors alerts but does not implement link availability mechanisms.
Overall system boundary; contains coordination but not direct link management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in the Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential single point of failure if Teleoperation module is compromised.
Dependency on Network Link interface reliability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate failover mechanisms and interface robustness in Teleoperation module design.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR of achieving target link availability.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as redundancy logic is contained within Teleoperation module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Teleoperation as the appropriate IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and link status monitoring is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Incorporate error detection and monitoring DPs in next refinement level.
Assess safety impact of link failures with Safety Services involvement.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition is sound, integrating additional DPs for error detection and monitoring will improve robustness and safety coverage given high safety criticality.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and recover from link failures promptly.
FR3: Report link availability metrics to stakeholders.

revise.why: To include complementary design parameters addressing error detection and real-time monitoring for enhanced link availability.

assumptions: Multiple network paths are available for redundancy.
Telemetry data is reliable for verification.
open_risks: Complexity of redundancy may impact maintainability.
Potential single point of failure in Teleoperation module.
